'''Charis Enasteri''' was the [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Neth Enasteri]].

==Biography==
After the foundation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], she and her husband hid on [[Rhamalai]] to escape the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. While on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], they had a daughter named [[Nadra Enasteri|Nadra]]. When Nadra was only a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] old, Neth was forced to flee Rhamalai to avoid being caught, leaving his family behind.

When the Empire came to Rhamalai in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], they had no use for the infirm Charis, so they scheduled her for termination.<ref name="TOoR" />

{{Char-stub}}
